meta.title: Business Technology & Innovation Solutions
meta.description: Suritargets delivers strategic business support, web applications, and digital solutions in Suriname.

hero.title: We build digital tools
hero.subtitle: From dashboards and web applications to ERP systems and AI marketing — custom-built for the Caribbean market.

services.label: SERVICES
services.title: What we do
services.description: Five specialised clusters that together support the full business cycle — from strategy to execution.

items.title: Caribbean understanding
items.description: We know the local market, regulations and cultural context of Suriname and the broader Caribbean region. That makes the difference between advice that looks good on paper and advice that actually works.

items.title: Proven methods
items.description: Our approach is based on internationally proven frameworks — from agile product development to forensic standards. We translate global best practices into your local reality.

items.title: Personal approach
items.description: No account managers, no being passed around. You work directly with the specialists who execute your project. Short lines, clear communication, full commitment.

meta.title: About us
meta.description: Suritargets is based in Paramaribo and delivers international quality for Caribbean businesses.

hero.label: About Suritargets
hero.title: About Suritargets
hero.subtitle: Based in Paramaribo. Focused on the region.

mission.label: MISSION
mission.title: We believe in local strength
mission.body1: Caribbean businesses deserve access to the same strategic intelligence and digital resources as their international competitors. We make that possible — without compromising on quality.
mission.body2: Our mission is to equip Caribbean businesses with the strategic intelligence and digital capabilities needed to thrive.

story.label: STORY
story.title: Founded in Suriname
story.body1: Suritargets was founded in Paramaribo with a clear vision: bringing international-level business services to the Caribbean market.
story.body2: Too often, local businesses faced an impossible choice: expensive foreign consultancies or underfunded local alternatives. We bridge that gap.
story.body3: With specialists in business intelligence, software development, legal research and education, we are building a foundation that structurally strengthens the region.

values.label: VALUES
values.title: What we stand for
values.description: Three principles that guide every decision and every deliverable.

items.description: No detours, no hidden agenda. Direct communication and honest advice — even when it is not what you want to hear.
Every deliverable carries our name. We deliver at the highest level or we do not deliver at all.
We build long-term relationships. Quick wins are nice; sustainable partnerships are our goal.

team.label: OUR TEAM
team.title: Specialists. Not generalists.
team.body: Our team consists of specialists in business intelligence, software development, legal research and education. Each project is guided by the right expertise — not by whoever is available.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Contact Suritargets for a no-obligation conversation about your project.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: We are ready to answer your questions and discuss your project.

meta.title: Services
meta.description: Business and individual services: dashboards, web applications, marketing, forensics, education and personal guidance.

hero.label: Suritargets
hero.title: Our services
hero.subtitle: For businesses and individuals.
hero.body: From business strategy to personal guidance — every trajectory is tailor-made, designed for your specific context and goals.

cta.label: Tailor-made
cta.title: Every service is custom-made.
cta.body: Get in touch to discuss your situation.

detail.ctaBody: Ready to get started? Get in touch for a no-obligation conversation about your situation and goals.

processSteps.title: Intake
processSteps.description: We start with a no-obligation conversation to clarify your goals, context and expectations.

processSteps.title: Analysis
processSteps.description: Thorough analysis of your situation and goals, so we can design a tailor-made approach.

processSteps.title: Execution
processSteps.description: Expert execution with regular progress reporting and direct lines of communication.

processSteps.title: Delivery
processSteps.description: Final result with aftercare and follow-up — we remain available after the project is completed.

meta.title: Pricing
meta.description: Transparent hourly rates per type of service at Suritargets.

hero.label: Transparent rates
hero.title: Pricing
hero.subtitle: Fixed hourly rates per type of service. No hidden costs — you always know where you stand.

cta.businessBody: For multi-week projects or ongoing partnerships, we are happy to provide a custom quote.
cta.individualBody: Schedule a free introductory call and discover what we can do for you.

dashboarding.name: Dashboarding & Data Visualisation
dashboarding.shortDescription: Custom-built dashboards and data visualisations for smarter decision-making.
dashboarding.description: We build fully custom dashboards and data visualisation platforms. From real-time KPI overviews to complex business intelligence tools — designed for your data, your processes and your team. No off-the-shelf software, everything custom made.
dashboarding.whoIsItFor: Organisations that have data but cannot get a clear picture from it. Ideal for management, finance teams and operational departments.

web-applications.name: Web & Applications
web-applications.shortDescription: Custom web applications, platforms and tools — built entirely from scratch.
web-applications.description: From concept to live platform: we build web and business applications that align with your processes. Including custom ERP systems, internal tools and customer-facing platforms. No off-the-shelf templates — everything custom made for your organisation.
web-applications.whoIsItFor: Businesses that need a custom platform, ERP system, internal tool or customer-facing application.

marketing-ai.name: Marketing with AI
marketing-ai.shortDescription: Smarter marketing powered by AI — content, campaigns and analytics at a higher level.
marketing-ai.description: We combine marketing expertise with AI technology to give Caribbean businesses a competitive edge. From AI-driven content creation to automated campaigns and customer analysis — marketing that works and scales.
marketing-ai.whoIsItFor: Businesses and brands in Suriname and the region that want to strengthen their marketing efforts with smart technology.

forensics.name: Forensics & Integrity
forensics.shortDescription: Digital forensic investigation and integrity audits.
forensics.description: We provide digital forensic investigations, compliance audits and integrity reviews for government, financial institutions and businesses. Confidential, thorough and independent.
forensics.whoIsItFor: Government agencies, financial institutions and businesses that need an independent forensic investigation.

education.name: Education
education.shortDescription: Hands-on training in AI, trading, automation and application development.
education.description: Suritargets Education offers practice-oriented courses for professionals and entrepreneurs who want to keep pace with technology. From AI fundamentals to vibe coding and financial applications — accessible, immediately applicable and fully tailored to the Caribbean market.
education.whoIsItFor: Professionals, entrepreneurs and teams who want to build concrete skills in AI, technology and modern business.
deliverables: Trading with AI — automated trading strategies
Vibe Coding — building with AI-driven development
Application development — from idea to working product
Financial applications — FinTech tools and platforms

education-1op1.name: 1-on-1 Education
education-1op1.shortDescription: Personal guidance in AI, tech and modern skills — at your own pace.
education-1op1.description: You have a question or want to understand something better — we explain it at your own pace, at your level. Whether it is AI & Technology, Trading with AI or Blockchain & Development: we guide you practically and personally.
education-1op1.whoIsItFor: Individuals and professionals who need extra explanation or want to understand a new topic without attending group training.
deliverables: Trading with AI — strategy and tools
Follow-up via chat after the session

begeleiding-innovation.name: Innovation Coaching
begeleiding-innovation.shortDescription: From idea to first step — we guide you from concept to business case.
begeleiding-innovation.description: You have an idea but do not know where to start. We help you develop it, test its feasibility and determine the first concrete steps. No vague advice — we work together on a clear plan.
begeleiding-innovation.whoIsItFor: Entrepreneurs and individuals with an idea or plan they want to develop but do not yet know how to start.
deliverables: Market exploration and target audience analysis
Determine first steps and action plan

begeleiding-blockchain.name: Blockchain Guidance
begeleiding-blockchain.shortDescription: Understand blockchain practically — from basics to your own use case.
begeleiding-blockchain.description: Do you want to understand how blockchain works and what it can mean for you? We explain it practically and clearly. From the basics of crypto and Web3 to exploring your own use case — without jargon, with real examples.
begeleiding-blockchain.whoIsItFor: Individuals and entrepreneurs who want to understand blockchain and discover how it can be relevant to their situation.
deliverables: Overview of relevant tools and platforms

digital-trail.name: Digital Trail / Resume Social
digital-trail.shortDescription: Build your professional online presence — so the right people find you.
digital-trail.description: Your online profile is your digital business card. We help you build a strong professional presence — from LinkedIn optimisation to a personal digital portfolio — so you stand out to the right people and opportunities.
digital-trail.whoIsItFor: Individuals who want to advance their career, are looking for work or assignments, or want to build their professional reputation online.

forensics-personal.name: Personal Forensics & Integrity
forensics-personal.shortDescription: Personal forensic advice and discreet investigation for your situation.
forensics-personal.description: Do you have a personal situation that requires discretion and investigation? We help you confidentially. Whether it is personal forensic advice, a confidential investigation or discreet reporting — we handle your case with the necessary care.
forensics-personal.whoIsItFor: Individuals who are in a situation where they need independent, confidential investigation or advice.

business-consulting.name: Business Consulting & Advisory
business-consulting.shortDescription: Strategic advice and guidance for businesses looking to grow, optimize or restructure.
business-consulting.description: We help businesses in Suriname and the Caribbean with strategic challenges that truly matter. From business optimization and process improvement to growth strategy and restructuring, we bring international management expertise to your organization. Practical, immediately applicable and tailored to your local context.
business-consulting.whoIsItFor: Owners, directors and managers of businesses facing growth challenges, looking to optimize their operations or in need of strategic realignment.

startup-to-founder.name: From Startup to Founder
startup-to-founder.shortDescription: From startup idea to functioning business — guidance for ambitious entrepreneurs in Suriname.
startup-to-founder.description: You have an idea bigger than a side project. We guide you through the full journey: from validating your concept to setting up your business structure, attracting your first customers and building a scalable foundation. No theory, just practical steps that work in the Caribbean market.
startup-to-founder.whoIsItFor: Ambitious entrepreneurs and startups in Suriname who want to build a serious business and seek guidance from someone who knows both the local market and international best practices.
deliverables: Go-to-market strategy for Suriname and region
Business registration and legal setup advice

pioneering-fundamentals.name: Pioneering Fundamentals
pioneering-fundamentals.shortDescription: The fundamentals of entrepreneurship and innovation — for those ready to start.
pioneering-fundamentals.description: Pioneering Fundamentals is the starting point for anyone who wants to seriously pursue entrepreneurship and innovation. You learn the core principles that distinguish successful pioneers: from mindset and self-leadership to recognizing opportunities and taking the first step. Practical, personal and immediately applicable, even without prior knowledge.
pioneering-fundamentals.whoIsItFor: Individuals who want to start entrepreneurship or innovation but do not yet have a clear starting point. Ideal for young talent, career changers and anyone ready for a new direction.
deliverables: Core principles of innovation and creativity
Taking your first steps as an entrepreneur

meta.title: Case Studies
meta.description: Project cases from Suritargets — proven results for Caribbean organisations.

caseStudies.label: CASES
caseStudies.title: Proven results
caseStudies.description: Concrete projects, measurable impact. Read how we help Caribbean organisations move forward.
caseStudies.ctaBody: Contact us for a no-obligation conversation.
